creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Raphael Kubo da Costa from comment #86

It looks like Dmitry handled the last exp-run.  If the qt4-moc patch doesn't require the new boost, then I think it should get committed before the the boost exp-run.

Probably the least confusing thing to do is to create a new PR for the qt4-moc patch and request an exp-run for that along with the other changes mentioned in comment #49 (or revert them before the exp-run).  List that PR as a blocker for this one.

If the exp-run looks OK, then commit those changes, and then we can request the boost exp-run which will have a much shorter list of changes to test.
